svg.text: Hub-Spoke | Private Endpoints | Terraform Managed | Peering via setup-peering.ps1
Allow: AML, Batch, Storage, KV tags
AI / ML Services (all via Private Endpoints - subnet .208/28)
Hub DNS resolver IP used as
Peered to spoke via PS1 script
Spoke egress routes via hub FW
Opt = set deploy_x = true in tfvars
Terraform greater than or equal to 1.5
